Projects

Here are some of the web development and backend-focused projects I have built, including full-stack systems with database integration and role-based functionality.

Sports Tournament Management System

A full-stack web application built using PHP and MySQL that manages tournaments, teams, match scheduling, and results with role-based authentication.

Focus: PHP, MySQL, HTML, CSS

GitHub Live Demo

Portfolio Website

My personal portfolio website built using Jekyll and custom CSS, focused on clean design and performance.

Focus: Jekyll, HTML, CSS

GitHub Live Demo

Focused on scalability and maintainability.
